completed_tasks.name: 09-03: Wire toast into AppContext + render pipeline

remaining_tasks.name: Complete /gsd:verify-work UAT for phase 09 (13 tests, test 1 in progress)

human_actions_pending.context: verify-work session started, UAT file created, paused after presenting test 1

decisions.decision: MaskedInput cursor tracked in raw-value space only
decisions.rationale: Separator skipping automatic; display col derived via precomputed slot_display_cols table (O(1))

decisions.decision: DirectoryTree lazy-loads via workers on first Space/Right press
decisions.rationale: on_mount has no ctx available; Loading... placeholder makes root appear expandable

decisions.decision: Toast uses Vec<ToastEntry> on AppContext not active_overlay
decisions.rationale: active_overlay is single-instance; toast stack needs multiple simultaneous entries

decisions.decision: render_toasts() fires before active_overlay in render_widget_tree
decisions.rationale: Ensures CommandPalette always renders on top of toasts

next_action: Resume /gsd:verify-work 9 — UAT file has 13 tests, test 1 (all unit tests pass) was being presented. All 263 tests pass including 34 new phase-09 tests.
context_notes: Phase 09 implementation is 100% complete. Three widgets shipped: MaskedInput (mask enforcement, cursor tracking, case modifiers), DirectoryTree (lazy loading, cycle detection, hidden file filter, symlink detection), Toast (severity coloring, z-order, auto-dismiss, persistent toasts). Only remaining work is UAT sign-off.
